map.title: Sète, within reach
map.subtitle: Our properties are in the heart of Sète — beaches, harbour, restaurants and cultural sites just minutes away.

agenda.title: Events in Sète
agenda.subtitle: Experience Sète through its festivals and traditions.

calculator.title: Calculate your stay
calculator.subtitle: Indicative price — contact us for an exact quote and availability.
calculator.disclaimer: Indicative price. Final price confirmed at booking.

traveler.a: You can book directly via our Airbnb listings by clicking 'View listing', or contact us using the form below for a direct booking.
It depends on the property. Pet policy is specified in each listing. Feel free to contact us for more details.
Our policy is flexible. Cancellation conditions vary by booking platform and are always clearly stated before confirmation.

traveler.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
traveler.a: Check-in is from 4pm, check-out by 11am. Flexible times may be arranged based on availability.
Yes, clean sheets and towels are included in all our properties at no extra charge.

owner.q: How much do your services cost?
owner.a: Our packages and rates are detailed in the section above. We offer several service levels to suit your needs.

owner.q: Can I still use my property personally?
owner.a: Absolutely. You retain full control of your calendar — just let us know your blocked dates in advance.
We carry out an inventory check at each checkout. Security deposits are managed via the platforms, and we handle any disputes.

owner.q: Which platforms do you list on?
owner.a: We manage your listings on Airbnb, Booking.com and Abritel, optimising pricing and content to maximise occupancy.
We can typically begin managing your property within 2 weeks of signing the management agreement.

steps.title: Free assessment
steps.desc: We visit your property and estimate its rental potential — with no commitment from you.

steps.title: Full management
steps.desc: Professional cleaning, linen provided, quality photos, optimised listing and guest welcome.

steps.title: Your income, effortlessly
steps.desc: Monthly transparent payouts, regular reports. You enjoy the returns — we handle everything.

voyageur.tagline: Experience Sète like a local, breathe like you're on holiday

items.title: Booking management
items.description: Complete management of your calendar, pricing and reservation confirmation on Airbnb and Booking.

items.title: Check-in & check-out
items.description: Personal welcome of your guests, property inspection and support throughout their stay.

items.title: Total peace of mind
items.description: Cleaning, laundry, minor maintenance and property management between stays. Your property is in safe hands.

about.title: Because every traveller deserves a real welcome
about.p1: We are a passionate couple who take charge of your property — whether it is your primary or secondary residence. Our backgrounds in hospitality, catering, and personal care have given us the skills needed to carry out these responsibilities.
about.p2: We chose a personal physical presence over an impersonal key safe. Being greeted in person genuinely elevates the quality of the stay.

values.label: Human welcome
values.text: Every guest is welcomed in person — never a key safe.

values.label: Trust
values.text: Founded in 2019, our experience grows richer every year through our guests and property owners.

values.label: Peace of mind
values.text: Warm, social and welcoming, we take our work to heart and ensure your guests enjoy a high-quality stay.

items.title: Listing creation
items.desc: Writing and photos on Airbnb & Booking

items.title: Cleaning
items.desc: Between stays, charged to the guest

ownerPricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
ownerPricing.subtitle: You can combine different services or choose a full package to suit your needs. Packages are available on request.
ownerPricing.billing_detail: Cleaning and laundry are charged to the guest — you keep 100% of your rental income.
ownerPricing.packNote: Full package available on request — e.g. Check-in + Check-out + cleaning. Call us on 06.59.76.91.94.

before.label: Booking management
before.detail: Listing + photos on Airbnb & Booking, pricing, Town Hall declaration, host relations until arrival, tourist tax declaration.

before.label: Cleaning
before.detail: Rate determined by the size and layout of your property — charged to the guest.

before.label: Double bed
before.detail: Laundry for double bed linen — charged to the guest.

before.label: Single bed
before.detail: Laundry for single bed linen — charged to the guest.

before.label: Towel kit
before.detail: One large + one small towel — charged to the guest.

during.label: Check-in / Check-out
during.detail: Personal welcome on arrival and property inspection on departure.

during.label: Shopping & catering
during.detail: Grocery runs, catering bookings and bespoke services.

during.label: Concierge during stay
during.detail: Available for your guests whenever needed throughout the stay.

tarifs_v.subtitle: Packages can be combined to suit your needs — contact us for a personalised quote.
tarifs_v.packNote: Full package available on request — e.g. Check-in + Check-out + cleaning.
